SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Use Custom Size for Alert Text
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: When off, the alert message always prints at a fixed large size regardless of Content Size.

EditTextPreference.app:title: Receipt Number Prefix
EditTextPreference.app:summary: The "1" in #1-0001 -- give each device printing entrance receipts (e.g. this phone vs. the Sunmi itself) its own prefix so numbers don't collide.

Preference.app:title: Enable as Android Print Service
Preference.app:summary: Opens Android's Printing settings so you can turn on Sunmi Printer as a print target for Gallery, Chrome, PDF viewers, etc.

EditTextPreference.app:title: Remote Printer Address
EditTextPreference.app:summary: Leave empty on the Sunmi printer itself. On any other phone/tablet, set this to the Sunmi device's ip:port (e.g. 192.168.1.50:8081) -- print jobs on this device with no local printer attached get sent there over WiFi instead.

Preference.app:title: Exit App
Preference.app:summary: Stop the print servers (HTTP, ESC/POS, MQTT, desktop connection) and close the app completely
